UUID.description: A unique identifier for a unique program.

case.yaml.title: Case
case.yaml.description: The collection of all data related to a specific patient or case in the context of a specific dataset or experiment.

submitter_id.description: A unique identifier for the case.

project_id.description: The project this case belongs to.

subject_id.description: A unique identifier for the subject associated with this case.

sample_id.description: A unique identifier for the sample associated with this case.

sex.description: The biological sex of the subject associated.

core_metadata_collection.yaml.title: Core Metadata Collection
core_metadata_collection.yaml.description: Metadata describing a specific submission and the project it belongs to.

submitter_id.description: A unique identifier for the submission.

projects.description: The project this metadata collection belongs to.

omics.yaml.title: Omics File
omics.yaml.description: A file containing omics data, such as genomic, transcriptomic, proteomic, or metabolomic data.

submitter_id.description: A unique identifier for the omics file submission.

case_id.description: The case this omics file belongs to.

sample_id.description: The sample this omics file was derived from.

file_name.description: The name of the omics data file.

file_format.description: The format of the omics data file (e.g., MAF, VCF, BAM, etc..)

program.yaml.title: Program
program.yaml.description: A top-level view of projects within data commons.

dbgap_accession_number.description: The dbgap accession number provided for the program.

project.yaml.title: Project
project.yaml.description: A subdivision of a program (e.g. submissions, datasets, metadata).

submitter_id.description: A unique identifier for the project.

name.description: The full name of the project.

code.description: A short identifier for the project.

programs.description: The program this project belongs to.
